open_issues.note: 17/18 turbo games >38 min (avg 51, max 67.5) — even the stomping team closes slowly; shared mode/push layer. Highest-value target once draft-fixed data confirms it.

~20/game 'Script Runtime Error: error in error handling' masks real stacks; unwrap early so later error signals are legible. Note: bot-VM print() does not reach the dedicated-server console log at all — [SOAK] draft marker never visible; may need a different emit channel (e.g. error-based) for in-game diagnostics.
18/18 games flag GetDesire hotspots, max ~7ms across many heroes (sniper/CM/lion/PA/slardar...). Frame-budget risk; profile after draft fix.

31 feeder anomalies (lich 55K/207D in 15 games, venomancer, dragon_knight, crystal_maiden) — ALL confounded by rigged draft (always Dire vs stacked Radiant). Re-rank from post-iter-0001 games before targeting any hero.
17 low_gpm anomalies, all Dire-side; same confound as feeders. Re-baseline after draft fix.
